clawscan_note: Uses agent Lexiang connector OAuth token via MCP endpoint. No app_key required. Sync logic runs entirely in Python scripts.
pr_description:
## sync-obsidian-to-lexiang

One-way sync from Obsidian vault to Tencent Lexiang knowledge base.

**Features:**
- Full and incremental sync
- Directory structure preservation
- Markdown + images + attachments
- Zero-config OAuth via agent connector
- Zero token: scripts run outside LLM context
